user.title: ThinQ Web Login
user.description: Sign in with your LG ThinQ account (ID/password). This is used only for air conditioner fan speed/swing control and the washer's current course sensor.

pat.title: Official ThinQ Connect (PAT)
pat.description: Enter your Personal Access Token, issued at connect-pat.lgthinq.com. This is used for power, mode, temperature and humidity control.

error.invalid_auth: ThinQ Web login failed. Check your username and password.
error.pat_invalid: PAT validation failed. Check your access token.
